tool.name: Dify
tool.description: Application development and workflow platform for LLM apps with plugin and enterprise features.
strengths: App + workflow surface in one stack
tool.licenseWarning: Dify's modified Apache 2.0 restricts multi-tenant deployment and requires retaining Dify branding without a commercial license.
tool.logoNotes: Official Dify docs/brand-guidelines logo asset (`d05cfc6ebe48f725d171dc71c64a5d16.svg`) from the owner-controlled docs site.
tool.practitionerNote: Good fit for teams that want one self-hostable surface for apps, workflows, and model operations, but the license and commercial boundary need review before standardising widely.

dataResidency.detail: Self-hosted is customer-controlled; Dify Cloud region not publicly documented.

deployment.detail: Docker/Kubernetes self-hosted, Dify Cloud SaaS, or enterprise on-prem.

auditLogging.detail: No dedicated audit-log documentation confirmed on public Dify docs.

soc2.detail: SOC 2 Type II (Sensiba), second consecutive year.

iso42001.detail: Not mentioned in Dify's public compliance documentation.

euAiAct.detail: Application/workflow platform tooling; deployer carries obligations for systems built with it.

licenseRisk.detail: Modified Apache-2.0 — adds multi-tenant and branding restrictions, outside OSI Apache-2.0.
